Hero.title: I am Mario Mojica: Industrial Designer specialized in automating the complete manufacturing and marketing cycle.

About.title: GENERATIVE DESIGN AND AUTOMATION MAXIMIZING PROFITABILITY IN THE FURNITURE INDUSTRY
About.p1: I am Mario Mojica, an Industrial Designer expert in process automation using generative design for the furniture industry. My career is not just measured in years, but in more than 3 million products that currently inhabit homes across Latin America. Since 2020, I have consolidated my profile as a technological strategist, dedicated to solving business inefficiency by fusing manufacturing mastery with AI acceleration.
About.p2: My focus is not just aesthetic; it's systemic. I use a cutting-edge ecosystem —integrating Rhino 3D, Grasshopper, and n8n— to transform the way products are conceived. My goal is to achieve superior profitability, creating optimized workflows ready for Manufacturing 4.0. I don't just design objects; I design the intelligent systems that make them possible.
About.p3: Specialized in turning slow design departments into high-performance units, my methodology integrates CNC workflows, advanced visualization in Blender/Three.js, and marketing automation. I have managed to reduce development and technical response cycles by up to 80%, eliminating traditional bottlenecks.
About.p4: Conventional design areas are often costly and non-agile; my mission is to change that reality. I bring 15 years of experience in mass manufacturing to an AI technology stack to deliver renders, blueprints, and assembly manuals with surgical precision. I accompany companies in making the definitive leap towards digital transformation, implementing processes that ensure their competitiveness in the global market.
